name: js-lang-hooks
description: Hooks for JavaScript and TypeScript development in Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Hooks for JavaScript and TypeScript development across Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode.
interface.longDescription: Provide language-specific hooks for JavaScript and TypeScript development across Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode, enabling automatic formatting, type-checking, linting, and testing.
